title: Universal Health (UHS) Up 17% in 3 Months: More Growth Ahead?
text: Universal Health (UHS) is well-poised for growth on the back of the resumption of elective procedures, acquisitions and solid operating cash flows.

title: 5 Hospital Stocks to Watch Amid Promising Industry Trends
text: Rising patient volumes and technological advancements for the Zacks Medical-Hospital industry players are major positives. HCA, UHS, THC, ACHC and CYH are poised to gain from improving operating efficiency.

title: Here's Why Universal Health Services (UHS) is a Strong Value Stock
